name: Belleville  Downtown YMCA
description: Belleville Downtown YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Belleville, IL. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, and lights.

name: Belleville recreational center
description: Come play pickleball at Belleville recreational center in Belleville, IL! There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $2.00  or $10.00 punch card for 6 sessions

name: East Belleville YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at East Belleville YMCA in Belleville, IL! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Hesse Park
description: Come play pickleball at Hesse Park in O'Fallon, IL! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Horner Park
description: Come play pickleball at Horner Park in Lebanon, IL! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: James Sports Center
description: Located inside the James Sports Center where the basketball courts are. Reservations may be needed.

name: Metro East Sportsplex
description: Metro East Sportsplex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Belleville, IL. There are 4 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free. Reservations are available.

description: Come play pickleball at Moody Park in Fairview Heights, IL! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

description: St. Clair Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in O'Fallon, IL. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: The Rec Complex of Fairview Heights
description: The Rec Complex of Fairview Heights is a place to play pickleball in Fairview Heights, IL. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons.
open_play_schedule: Pickleball is open play, every day. Most of our games start around 9:00 AM - 9:30 AM, with the exception of Sunday play, which starts at 10:00 AM. We look forward to seeing you!
fees: Fee required — Members do not need to pay, non-members may need to purchase a day pass
